tasks.build: deno task client:typecheck && deno run -A npm:vite build
tasks.start: deno task build && deno run --allow-net --allow-read --allow-env src/server/main.ts
tasks.dev: deno task build && (deno task client:watch & deno run --allow-net --allow-read --allow-env --watch src/server/main.ts)
tasks.fmt: deno fmt src/ && deno fmt --no-config src/shared
tasks.lint: deno lint src/server && deno lint --no-config src/shared
tasks.test: deno test src/server && deno test --no-config src/shared && deno task client:test
tasks.check: deno check src/server/main.ts && deno task client:typecheck
